title: Bleu_2ay's Spider Model
description: A texture pack that changes the model of the Spider and Cave Spider!
body:
A resource pack that gives Spiders and Cave Spiders a more modern style design.

They're now more anotomically accurate with a cephalothorax and abdomen as well as pedipalps, chelicerae and thinner legs. Cave Spiders also have a slightly different model from regular Spiders as well as different colored eyes.

Requires Entity Model Features mod to work, though it could also run with Optifine.

Design and model: [Bleu_2ay on Twitter](https://x.com/Bleu_2ay)

Author: [ALtheGatorMC on Twitter](https://x.com/ALtheGatorMC)
